title: River Monsters
subTitle: On a volcanic island in the Pacific, terror grips a fishing community when something in the water leaves a trail of bloody victims in its wake. The only clues they have to the attacker's identity are the large puncture wounds it left behind.

title: Gangs of Baboon Falls
subTitle: As lockdown continues, the streets of Victoria Falls have become eerily deserted, and the gangs must now figure out new ways to survive in a dramatically changed world.

title: Surviving Australia
subTitle: Survivors and experts share tales of Australia's deadly beaches and dangerous waters.

title: Pride Rules
subTitle: Witness joyous births, shattering deaths and battles galore as the Waterfront Pride fights to maintain control over the banks of Botswana's Chobe River.

title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
subTitle: Encountering coastal sea wolves, endangered marmots, western toad tadpoles, and more while exploring the island of Vancouver, one of the most extraordinary ecosystems on the planet.

title: The Animal Within
subTitle: Explores how animals have evolved over time, and analyses their evolution to learn and benefit from nature's engineering.

title: Battle of the Alphas
subTitle: Madagascar is home to strange animals not found anywhere else on Earth. When these animals fight for supremacy, their battles are just as strange -- from weird neck-wrestling weevils to ring-tailed lemur mums that go into battle with baby on board.

title: Battle of the Alphas
subTitle: Australia is home to an eclectic array of creatures, and the ways to succeed as an alpha are just as diverse. The beach turns into a duelling ground, and the outback becomes a boxing ring, as animals face off with their own kind.

title: Great Species of Africa
subTitle: Africa's most majestic big cats face numerous challenges that threaten their future survival in the vast plains of Serengeti.

title: Islands: Nature's Wild Laboratories
subTitle: Encountering coastal sea wolves, endangered marmots, western toad tadpoles, and more while exploring the island of Vancouver, one of the most extraordinary ecosystems on the planet.

title: The Animal Within
subTitle: Explores how animals have evolved over time, and analyses their evolution to learn and benefit from nature's engineering.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Wade faces one of his greatest fears to uncover increasing missing persons cases.

title: Surviving Australia
subTitle: Survivors and experts share tales of Australia's deadly beaches and dangerous waters.

title: Big Cats of the Serengeti
subTitle: Cameras reveal the last secrets of Africa's largest wild lions by following two prides.

title: Pride Rules
subTitle: Witness joyous births, shattering deaths and battles galore as the Waterfront Pride fights to maintain control over the banks of Botswana's Chobe River.

title: Zambia Untamed
subTitle: The plains and woodlands of the Luangwa Valley are the wildest and most merciless of all neighbourhoods where duels between predator and prey are played out both day and night. For the animals that call this home, it's a daily battle to stay alive.

title: Nature's Ultimate Survivors
subTitle: The filmmakers explore remarkable aquatic life, showcasing birds and symbiotic relationships that diverse species have adapted to survive in challenging river and ocean environments.

title: Predator Countdown
subTitle: Take a trip to Africa, where the law of the jungle prevails and allows curious minds to observe the lives of lions, crocodiles and cheetahs.

title: Zambia Untamed
subTitle: As the dry season begins, thousands of animals are making their way to the Acacia Loop. Each must establish their place in the pecking order and avoid the dangerous residents who are all too willing to make a meal of the unwary.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Extreme fishing series. Jeremy investigates three mysterious deaths in three South American countries on his most remote mission to date.

title: Cute to Killer
subTitle: Zimbabwe is the perfect habitat for Africa's finest predator. Follow the development of four cubs, from two weeks to three years old, as they progress from 'Cute to Killer'.

title: A Game Of Leopard Thrones
subTitle: Filmed over ten years, an in-depth look at the leopard characters of South Africa and their fascinating unfolding story once their Queen dies.

title: Great White Assassins
subTitle: It's time to dive deep into the ocean and get up close and personal with one of the world's deadliest predators and explore their secret lives.

title: Surviving Australia
subTitle: Venturing into Australia's wild reveals nature's beauty and challenges.

subTitle: The sandy island of K'Gari, formerly Fraser Island, stretches off the east coast of Australia.

subTitle: Kurdt Greenwood's is on a quest is to seek out South Africa's 12 most deadly snakes and to educate and inspire people to see the value of these often misunderstood creatures.

subTitle: The filmmakers shed light on a variety of dangerous wild animals in Africa, including big cats that hunt zebras, buffaloes and even humans.

subTitle: Australia's suburbs conceal threats from wildlife and extreme weather.

subTitle: Travelling to some of the world's major forests and jungles, providing a complete view of their wildlife, biodiversity and importance for life on the planet.

title: Jungle Planet
subTitle: Cameras capture the beauty, diversity and richness of the world's forests and jungles.

title: The Big Dry
subTitle: The Luangwa Valley in Zambia experiences one of the toughest dry seasons imaginable. This comprises of seven months with no rain and spiraling temperatures. This time, the drought is threatening to be even more intense than usual.

title: The Big Dry
subTitle: The drought in the Luangwa valley strengthens due to a global El Nino event. There has been no rain since April and desperate animals are drawn to the only source of water left in the valley, the Luangwa River.

title: Zambia Untamed
subTitle: As temperatures soar, lagoons and waterholes are drying up. This forces Mvula and his family to undertake a long and dangerous journey to the only remaining source of water, the Luangwa River.

subTitle: Featuring the African Savanna's star-studded ensemble cast in nature's symphony of life.

title: Predator Countdown
subTitle: A closer look at Australia's arid landscape and the incredible battles between predators and prey, including a large monitor lizard, saltwater crocodiles and more.

title: Great Species of Africa
subTitle: Featuring the African Savanna's star-studded ensemble cast in nature's symphony of life.

title: River Monsters
subTitle: Daring biologist and extreme fisherman Jeremy Wade travels to Guyana in South America in search of a terrifying river monster believed to be responsible for the mysterious disappearance of several people.

title: Wild and Wonderful Denmark
subTitle: Getting up close and personal with Danish wildlife that live in the country's forests. The cameras film inside a fox den with a mother fox and her newborn cubs, and follow a majestic golden eagle whilst it is out hunting.

title: A Game Of Leopard Thrones
subTitle: Filmed over ten years, an in-depth look at the leopard characters of South Africa and their fascinating unfolding story once their Queen dies.

title: Wild and Wonderful Denmark
subTitle: Diving into the oceans that surround Denmark and meeting the creatures that live there. Some of the mysterious creatures featured include the anglerfish that camouflages itself on the ocean floor.

title: The Incredible Five: A Cheetah's Tale
subTitle: Cheetahs are the high-speed hunters of the Savannah but few attempt to take on larger prey than gazelles or smallish antelopes.

title: Predators Playbook
subTitle: An exploration of the unique features that allow predators to survive in often hostile environments,. such as speed and agility to undetectable camouflage.

title: Europe's Amazon
subTitle: Going on a 750km journey down the Drava river, starting with the current's Alpine origins to its delta in the Pannonian Basin.

title: Nature's Ultimate Survivors
subTitle: The filmmakers reveal the survival skills of the toughest animals, from foxes to fish and enormous mammals fighting for their breeding rights.

title: Tiger Guards Of Kanha
subTitle: Forest guards and patrolling officers at Kanha Tiger Reserve highlight the history since its inception and talk about the gruesome attacks on the staff.

title: Tiger Guards Of Kanha
subTitle: Explore the activities in a day of a tiger guard who faces various challenges on daily patrol. Also discover how one guard survived a bear ambush while on duty.

title: A Game Of Leopard Thrones
subTitle: Filmed over ten years, an in-depth look at the leopard characters of South Africa and their fascinating unfolding story once their Queen dies.
